Usage: repose install [OPTIONS] REPA

  add specified repository to target and install product

Arguments:
  REPA  REPA pattern specification for needed repository  [required]

Options:
  -t, --target HOST        target to operate on  [required]
  --probe-timeout SECONDS  seconds to wait per repository URL probe (default: 5)
                           [default: 5.0]
  --no-probe               skip repository URL liveness probes
  -h, --help               Show this message and exit.
